scripts.dev: npm --prefix themes/revaulter run build && HUGO_CACHEDIR=$PWD/.hugo_cache PATH=$PWD/themes/revaulter/node_modules/.bin:$PATH hugo server
scripts.build: npm --prefix themes/revaulter run build && HUGO_CACHEDIR=$PWD/.hugo_cache PATH=$PWD/themes/revaulter/node_modules/.bin:$PATH hugo --gc --minify
